diagrams.title: Nested Try Statement Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the control flow when exception occurs in nested try blocks. Demonstrates how JVM searches for handlers from inner to outer and the execution order of catch and finally blocks.
diagrams.purpose: Visualize exception handling flow in nested try statements and understand handler search order.

diagrams.title: Exception Propagation in Nested Try
diagrams.description: Illustrates how an exception travels through nested try-catch blocks. Shows the scenario where exception is caught at inner level vs. propagated to outer level.
diagrams.purpose: Understand when exceptions are caught locally vs. propagated to outer handlers.

diagrams.title: Three-Level Nested Try Structure
diagrams.description: Complete structure showing three levels of nested try with their respective catch and finally blocks, demonstrating the complete hierarchy.
diagrams.purpose: Show complete nested structure and help visualize multi-level exception handling scenarios.
